message:
feat(tools,share): extend bundle assembly, messaging, and reservation handlers

- bundle.rs: expand attachment materialization with inline embedding
  threshold, file-based fallback, and external reference modes; add
  DB chunk size calculation and multi-part ZIP generation
- messaging.rs: improve archive write error context and thread digest
  handling
- reservations.rs: extend force-release heuristics with additional
  inactivity signals and notification improvements
- tools/Cargo.toml: add new dependency

Update Python reference scratch data, add tool_filter conformance
fixtures, and update legacy Python code pointer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
